summary: Comprehensive testing of BO Health & Wellness MVP completed. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major flows tested and working after fixing login navigation bug. AI chat integration verified working with real OpenAI responses.

integration_issues.issue: After successful login/register, user stayed on auth screen instead of navigating to onboarding/dashboard
integration_issues.fix_applied: Added useEffect hooks in login.tsx and register.tsx to watch user state and navigate when user is set

critical_code_review_comments: Login/Register screens were missing navigation logic after successful authentication - FIXED
All backend APIs properly exclude MongoDB _id field
testID attributes present on all interactive elements
React Native components properly used (no HTML elements)
AI chat integration working with real OpenAI API via emergentintegrations
seed_data_creation: Backend automatically seeds admin user, 6 diet plans (keto, mediterranean, vegan, clean-eating, high-protein, balanced), and 18 meals on startup. Test user (test@bo.com) was already registered.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Login/register navigation bug was fixed. Backend APIs all passing. AI chat verified working with real OpenAI. No critical issues remaining.

test_categories.authentication: 8 tests - register, login, duplicate email, wrong password, get me, no token, refresh token
test_categories.diet_plans: 4 tests - get all plans (6 plans), get keto plan with meals, nonexistent plan 404, get meals by plan
test_categories.dashboard_tracking: 5 tests - get dashboard, log water with persistence check, log nutrition with persistence check, daily water, daily nutrition
test_categories.social_feed: 5 tests - create post with persistence, get feed, like/unlike post, add comment with persistence, like nonexistent post 404
test_categories.ai_chat: 3 tests - send message and get AI response, get chat history, chat without auth 401
test_categories.profile: 3 tests - get profile, update profile with persistence, save onboarding data

tested_flows: Login screen renders with BO logo, email/password inputs, sign-in button
Login with test@bo.com / Test1234! successfully navigates to dashboard
Dashboard shows greeting, daily stats (water, calories, meals), macros, quick-add buttons
Quick Add Water button logs 250ml water
Quick Add Breakfast button logs meal
Smart Menu tab shows 6 diet plan chips (Keto, Mediterranean, Vegan, Clean Eating, High Protein, Balanced)
Selecting Keto plan loads and displays meals with images, nutrition info, and Log buttons
Community Feed tab shows post input and submit button
Creating a post successfully adds it to the feed
AI Coach tab shows welcome screen with suggestions
Sending message to AI Coach receives personalized response based on user profile
Profile tab shows user info (name, email, subscription), goals, dietary preferences, body stats, settings menu, logout button
screenshots_captured: /tmp/02_menu_keto.png - Smart Menu with Keto plan selected showing meals

ai_integration_status: WORKING - AI chat tested with real OpenAI API (gpt-4.1-mini). Response received successfully with personalized context based on user profile (goals, dietary preferences, allergies, weight info).

mobile_design_review.touch_targets: All buttons appear to be minimum 44x44 points
mobile_design_review.contrast: Good contrast - white/light text on dark background (#0A0A0A)
mobile_design_review.branding: BO Green (#26B50F) and BO Lime (#DBFF02) colors used consistently
mobile_design_review.logo: BO logo displays correctly from customer assets URL
mobile_design_review.navigation: Bottom tab navigation working correctly with 5 tabs
